<!--
Thanks for contributing to VeloSpot! 🚲
Please fill out the sections below so your change can be reviewed quickly.
Keep the title short and descriptive (Conventional Commits style is appreciated,
e.g. "feat(map): cluster favourite markers").
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? A short, plain-language description. -->

## Type of change

<!-- Tick all that apply. -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that changes existing behaviour)
- [ ] 🧹 Refactor / code cleanup (no functional change)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation only
- [ ] 🔧 Build, CI or tooling change

## Related issues

<!-- Link issues this PR closes or relates to, e.g. "Closes #123". -->

Closes #

## How was this tested?

<!-- Describe the steps you took to verify your change. -->

- [ ] Unit tests (`./gradlew test`)
- [ ] Android Lint (`./gradlew lint`)
- [ ] Manual testing on a device / emulator (please note Android version)

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For UI changes, add before/after screenshots or a short screen recording. Otherwise, delete this section. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's style and conventions
- [ ] I performed a self-review of my own changes
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under the `## [Unreleased]` section
- [ ] I updated the documentation where needed (README, privacy policy, etc.)
- [ ] New and existing tests pass locally
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or Lint errors
- [ ] I respected user privacy — no new data leaves the device without disclosure
